entity.summary: Injective-based decentralized exchange combining automated market making and aggregation for spot swaps.
entity.notes: The first-party domain remains reachable and current exchange directory data reports active markets. Launch date remains null because this review did not recover a sufficiently precise first-party launch marker.

evidence.title: Choice official exchange website
evidence.notes: First-party exchange domain used as the current service identity reference.

evidence.title: Choice exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange directory corroborates the DEX identity, Injective ecosystem placement, and current market activity.
